<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_rarity/styles.css" /><infobox theme="rarity-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''<br/><span class="rarity-{{{name}}}" style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">Rarity Tier</span></format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}} rarity]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="upgrade_count">
            <label>Upgrades</label>
            <format>{{{upgrade_count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="scrap_resource">
            <label>Scrap Resource</label>
            <format><code>{{{scrap_resource}}}</code></format>
        </data>
        <data source="color">
            <label>Color</label>
            <format><span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;background:{{{color}}};border:1px solid #444;vertical-align:middle;"></span> <code>{{{color}}}</code></format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a rarity tier in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox rarity
|name = Display name (e.g. "Exotic")
|api_name = Lowercase key (e.g. "exotic")
|icon = Icon filename
|color = Hex color (e.g. "#FFAD3B")
|background = Hex background color
|scrap_resource = Scrap resource ID (e.g. "scrap_exotic")
|upgrade_count = Number of upgrades at this tier
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
